hypothesis: In mixtures of three or more reactive gases, augmenting the GraphSAGE graph with explicit edge features representing normalized pairwise reaction propensities computed from single-gas PBM outputs (at the same operating conditions) will improve mixture etch-rate prediction such that the test-set R2 increases by at least 0.05 relative to the node-only GraphSAGE model and also outperforms a baseline mixture FNN.
